text: Great work <@U0A85GRJEG4>! The one issue I have about building everything in a canvas mode is that it mixes development stuff that I want to hide when I want to interact with the system that I've built on a day to day basis. And also, personally, I have a big problem with text getting bigger and smaller as I zoom in and out. So, perhaps having multiple levels of customisation/configuration that can be hidden when "run". Does this resonate with you? I would love to chat about your work and how it compares to Kendraio, our mini app builder prototype. Do you have time next week? Early afternoons of Tuesdays or Wednesdays are generally good. Cheers!
